mapper.insert: insert into t_asset_transaction (invoice_no, invoice_action, record_time, amount, asset_ledger_id, transaction_type, invoice_type, spending_type, income_type, settlement_status, invoice_owner, data_source, remark, update_time, update_by) values (#{invoiceNo}, #{invoiceAction}, #{recordTime}, #{amount}, #{assetLedgerId}, #{transactionType}, #{invoiceType}, #{spendingType}, #{incomeType}, #{settlementStatus}, #{invoiceOwner}, #{dataSource}, #{remark}, now(), #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
update t_asset_transaction
invoice_no = #{invoiceNo},
invoice_action = #{invoiceAction},
record_time = #{recordTime},
amount = #{amount},
asset_ledger_id = #{assetLedgerId},
transaction_type = #{transactionType},
invoice_type = #{invoiceType},
spending_type = #{spendingType},
income_type = #{incomeType},
settlement_status = #{settlementStatus},
invoice_owner = #{invoiceOwner},
data_source = #{dataSource},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_asset_transaction where id in
#{item}
